summary: Completed testing of 'Convert Lead to Account' feature. All backend API tests passed (16/16). Frontend UI testing confirmed: Accounts navigation works, Account List page with search/filter, Account Detail page with editable SKU pricing, Convert to Account button appears for unconverted won leads, View Account button appears for converted leads.

issues: Shows UUID instead of user name (e.g., '38a4c602-8f1f-47fc-99fb-a56eea37fcd9' instead of 'John Doe'). Consider resolving user name on frontend or returning it from backend.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/accounts - returns paginated accounts list (200)
Backend: GET /api/accounts with pagination params works
Backend: GET /api/accounts with search filter works
Backend: GET /api/accounts with account_type filter works
Backend: GET /api/accounts/:id - returns account details (200)
Backend: GET /api/accounts/:id - returns 404 for non-existent account
Backend: POST /api/accounts/convert-lead - rejects already converted lead (400)
Backend: POST /api/accounts/convert-lead - returns 404 for non-existent lead
Backend: POST /api/accounts/convert-lead - successfully converts won lead and creates account
Backend: PUT /api/accounts/:id - updates basic fields (contact_name)
Backend: PUT /api/accounts/:id - updates SKU pricing array
Backend: PUT /api/accounts/:id - updates account_type
Backend: GET /api/accounts/:id/invoices - returns invoice data
Backend: GET /api/auth/me - returns user role for nav permissions
Backend: Converted lead has converted_to_account=true and account_id set
Backend: Account ID format is NAME4-CITY-AYY-SEQ
Frontend: Accounts navigation visible in sidebar
Frontend: Accounts list page loads with search and type filter
Frontend: Account detail page shows all sections (info, location, SKU pricing, invoices, financial)
Frontend: Edit mode activates and allows SKU pricing changes
Frontend: Add SKU button adds new row with dropdown selector
Frontend: Save Changes button saves and shows success toast
Frontend: View Account button appears on converted lead detail page
Frontend: Clicking View Account navigates to account page
Frontend: Convert to Account button NOT shown for already converted leads
action_items: Consider showing user name instead of UUID in 'Assigned To' field on Account Detail page
critical_code_review_comments: Account ID format NAME4-CITY-AYY-SEQ is correctly implemented and verified
Lead conversion properly sets converted_to_account=true and account_id on the original lead
SKU pricing is stored as array of objects with proper serialization
All data-testid attributes are present for key interactive elements
seed_data_creation: Backend tests may have created additional accounts by converting won leads. Tests properly reverted test data changes for account updates.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Convert Lead to Account feature is fully implemented and working. Key accounts: TOOP-HYD-A26-001 (existing), LEAD-HYD-A26-001 (created from LEAD_17). Test the View Account button from Lead Detail pages. SKU pricing edit functionality works correctly.

rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: N/A - Feature was newly implemented and working correctly
rca_of_the_issue.test_coverage: Tested all 7 features in the request: Accounts list, Account detail, Convert button, View Account button, API conversion, API update with SKU pricing, Accounts navigation
